BookingKoala overview
URL: https://help.bookingkoala.com/help/bookingkoala-overview

BookingKoala overview
Learn the basics about the BookingKoala platform including options for new and existing business, multiple languages, custom domains, and more.

Last updated on16 Feb, 2026

In this overview, we will go over the following questions:

Ģ What is BookingKoala?
Ģ Who is BookingKoala for?
Ģ What industries can use BookingKoala?
Ģ Can I use BookingKoala outside of the US?
Ģ Can BookingKoala be translated into different languages?
Ģ Can I use my own website?
Ģ Can I use custom domains?
Ģ Where can I access my data from?
Ģ How easy is it to get started?

What is BookingKoala?
BookingKoala is software designed to launch your service business in 60 seconds. You come to BookingKoala, pick a theme, pick your industry, and a website powered by our powerful features will be set up for you in seconds.

Who is BookingKoala for?
New and upcoming entrepreneurs looking to start a service business AND existing service businesses that are looking to use our powerful features to help them grow.

We've put together these setup guides for how to get started if you are a new business or an existing business.

What industries can use BookingKoala?
Please click here to explore all the different types of businesses you can start using BookingKoala. Of course, these are examples, and there are many other businesses you can create. The important part is getting creative and figuring out how to use our software to build out your business idea.

To get help from other entrepreneurs, you can also join our Facebook group.

Can I use BookingKoala outside of the US?
Yes, our software operates worldwide.

Can BookingKoala be translated into different languages?
Yes, all users can translate their site from English to any language currently available via the Google Translate API. Premium subscribers can allow their customers and providers to use their store in multiple languages.

Click here to learn more about language and translation features in Bookingkoala.

Can I use my own website?
Yes, if you don't want to build a website on BookingKoala, you can use your already existing website and embed our forms on your already existing site.

Click here to view our guide on how to embed forms.

Can I use custom domains?
Yes, if you want to get rid of the "Bookingkoala" part of your "abc.bookingkoala.com" domain, we made for you, then you can change that in the settings so that your domain can be "www.abc.com" instead.

Click here to view our guide on how to set up custom domains.

Where can I access my data from?
Your customers, providers, office employees, and you can access your data from anywhere in the world on any device. Your data is securely stored inside a cloud.

How easy is it to get started?
To start a free trial for the Starter Plan, click here.

To start a free trial for the Growing Plan, click here.

To start a free trial for the Premium Plan, click here.

If you have more than 50 total providers, click here to visit our pricing page and click the orange "See Larger Plans" below the three primary subscription types.



New business? How to start.
URL: https://help.bookingkoala.com/help/new-business-how-to-start

New business? How to start.
You will learn step by step how to set up BookingKoala for your new business.

Last updated on 16 Feb, 2026

The purpose of this article is to help you understand how to set up your:

Ģ Store options
Ģ Forms and industries
Ģ Smart scheduling
Ģ Notifications
Ģ Providers and teams
Ģ Website and form builder
Ģ Extra features

If you are starting a new business and just subscribed to BookingKoala, welcome!  We recommend that you follow this checklist in order to set up your store.   Go through each option carefully to decide how you would like your business to operate.

1. Set up your preferred settings in the Store Options section.
Please go to:

Settings > General > Store Options

There are five sections under Store Options .  Read each section carefully and set them up according to your preferences.

Here are several articles that will help you understand each section.

Ģ General Store Options
Ģ Customer Store Options
Ģ Provider Store Options
Ģ Admin Store Options
Ģ Scheduling Store Options

2. Set up all your forms and industries.
There are five types of booking forms in BookingKoala. Each booking form represents a different way of pricing services.

Pick which booking form is right for your business.

Then, go through your Form Settings to see which kinds of options and features you can set up.

You can click the links in the article above to view detailed setup guides for each form or use the links below for a guide on how to set up each form section.

Ģ Locations
Ģ Frequencies
Ģ Service Categories
Ģ Pricing Parameters (used in Form 1 )
Ģ Pricing Parameters (used in Form 4 )
Ģ Items (used in Form 2 and Form 3 )
Ģ Packages (used in Form 2 )
Ģ Add-Ons (used in Form 2 )
Ģ Add-Ons (used in Form 3 )
Ģ Extras
Ģ Custom Sections

After adding everything, make sure your payment processor is activated if you accept credit/debit card payments and sales tax is activated (if you collect sales tax).

Ģ Set up sales tax
? Setting up taxes with Taxify

3. Set up smart scheduling
You can view this article which will explain in detail our smart scheduling and how to set it up properly.

4. Prepare your notifications.
Make sure that your email notifications are verified and that your SMS notifications are set up .

Then, you can modify your email and SMS notifications to customize them for your business.

Ģ Notifications overview
Ģ Email notifications
Ģ SMS notifications
Ģ System Alerts

For example, make sure all your links are connected to your social media accounts and images are replaced inside your emails.

5. Create and set up your providers/teams
Start with this Provider/Team overview to learn more about providers and teams.

Download the BookingKoala for Providers app and learn more about how providers can use the app to clock in and out of jobs, add job notes, get customer signatures, and more in the Provider app overview .

Later you can start adding in your providers/teams and then setting up their:

Ģ Schedules
Ģ General Settings
Ģ Industry Settings
Ģ Form Settings
Ģ Payments

For a faster onboarding experience, you can use the Import Tool.

6. Our themes or your existing website?
When you sign up for BookingKoala, a website is already generated when your account is created. You can use the BookingKoala Website Builder to customize the appearance of your site and forms.

You can also customize and embed the forms onto an existing, third-party website.

Here are some articles to help you:

Ģ Themes versus forms
Ģ Themes overview and how to customize your site
Ģ Customizing the look of your forms
Ģ How to embed forms on my existing website
Ģ How to preview my website made by BookingKoala

7. Use our extra features.
Here are some extra things that you can do to your store:

12 Send quotes to customers.
13 Activate your Facebook and Google logins
14 Set up "lead"/contact us forms
15 Create coupons for your customers.
16 Set up booking checklists for your providers and customers to review.
17 Learn how to create and send invoices to customers.
18 Add a blog to your site
19 Link your Intuit Quickbooks account to track revenue
20 View the reports section
21 Connect a Zapier account to automate tasks
22 Customize your gift cards - Growing & Premium
23 Set up referral sharing - Growing & Premium
24 Set up the Hiring Module for quicker, easier onboarding and hiring - Growing (some features available) & Premium (all features available)
25 Add multiple industries - Growing & Premium
26 Set up and send out campaigns - Premium
27 Add languages and translations - Premium

We are actively developing our software and are constantly coming out with new features. Be sure to check the Help Center for articles and videos as new features are announced!

Congratulations! Your store is now set up and live.

Existing business? How to start.
URL: https://help.bookingkoala.com/help/existing-business-how-to-start

Existing business? How to start.
You will learn step by step how to set up BookingKoala for your already existing business.

Last updated on 16 Feb, 2026

The purpose of this article is to help you understand how to set up your:
Ģ Store options
Ģ Forms and industries
Ģ Smart scheduling
Ģ Notifications
Ģ Providers and teams
Ģ Website and form builder
Ģ Extra features

After you are ready to make the switch from your current software to BookingKoala, it is recommended that you follow this checklist in order.

1. Set up your preferred settings in the Store Options section.
Please go to: Settings > General > Store Options

There are five sections under Store Options. Read each section carefully and set them up according to your preferences.

Here are several articles that will help you understand each section.
Ģ General Store Options
Ģ Customer Store Options
Ģ Provider Store Options
Ģ Admin Store Options
Ģ Scheduling Store Options

2. Set up all your forms and industries.
There are five types of booking forms in BookingKoala. Each booking form represents a different way of pricing services.

Pick which booking form is right for your business. View examples of each type of pricing structure to decide which will fit your industry best.

Then, go through your Form Settings to see which kinds of options and features you can set up.

You can also click the links in the article above to view detailed setup guides for each form or use the links below for a guide on how to set up each form section.
Ģ Locations
Ģ Frequencies
Ģ Service Categories
Ģ Pricing Parameters (used in Form 1)
Ģ Pricing Parameters (used in Form 4)
Ģ Items (used in Form 2 and Form 3)
Ģ Packages (used in Form 2)
Ģ Add-Ons (used in Form 2)
Ģ Add-Ons (used in Form 3)
Ģ Extras
Ģ Custom Sections

After adding everything, make sure your payment processor is activated if you accept credit/debit card payments and sales tax is activated (if you collect sales tax).
Ģ Set up sales tax
? Setting up taxes with Taxify

3. Set up smart scheduling.
You can view this article which will explain in detail our smart scheduling and how to set it up properly.

4. Prepare your notifications.
Make sure that your email notifications are verified and that your SMS notifications are set up.

Then, you can modify your email and SMS notifications to customize them for your business.
Ģ Notifications overview
Ģ Email notifications
Ģ SMS notifications
Ģ System Alerts

For example, make sure all your links are connected to your social media accounts and images are replaced inside your emails.

5. Disable all of your notifications for a short period of time.
Once you have notifications set up and verified, you will want to disable all of them to make sure no one gets any notifications when you are creating your customers and/or providers later.

6. Create and set up your providers/teams.
Start with this Provider/Team overview to learn more about providers and teams.

Download the BookingKoala for Providers app and learn more about how providers can use the app to clock in and out of jobs, add job notes, get customer signatures, and more in the Provider app overview.

Later you can start adding in your providers/teams and then setting up their:
Ģ Schedules
Ģ General Settings
Ģ Industry Settings
Ģ Form Settings
Ģ Payments

For a faster onboarding experience, you can use the Import Tool.

7. Import your customers.
Next, you can begin importing your existing customers. This can be done by using the import tool, or by manually creating new profiles.
Ģ Add and invite customers
Ģ Import your customers

You can refer to the Customer overview for a complete guide on how to create and manage customer accounts.

Please note: Customer accounts are generated automatically whenever you create a booking with a new email address (one that is not already in the system). If you have customers with active bookings, you can save time by scheduling their services and saving their profiles in one step.

8. Put in all of your bookings.
Here are some articles that discuss how bookings work, how to send quotes, and how to use the Unassigned Folder feature.
Ģ Bookings overview.
Ģ Send a quote.
Ģ Unassigned folder.

Please note: If you collect sales tax, please make sure you have set it up before bookings are added. Otherwise, when sales tax is activated later on or modified, all active bookings will get a message that sales tax has been modified.

The next time you save the booking, it will add the sales tax to bookings that were made before the sales tax was added or modified.

9. Reactivate your notifications.
Go back and activate any notifications you previously disabled.

For more information about each type of notification, click here.

10. Our themes or your existing website?
When you sign up for BookingKoala, a website is already generated when your account is created. You can use the BookingKoala Website Builder to customize the appearance of your site and forms.

You can also customize and embed the forms onto an existing, third-party website.

BookingKoala referral program
URL: https://help.bookingkoala.com/help/bookingkoala-referral-program

BookingKoala referral program
Learn how you can earn credits for referring others to BookingKoala.

Last updated on 18 Mar, 2022

Do you have friends that may be interested in using BookingKoala?

Ģ For every paying " Premium " user, we will give you $ 197 in credits.
Ģ For every paying " Growing " user, we will give you $ 57 in credits.
Ģ For every paying 'Starter' user, we will give you $ 27 in credits.

You can use these credits towards your BookingKoala subscription ONLY.

How does it work?
Inside your account in the top right-hand corner, click on your name and a drop-down menu will appear. Then, click " Earn Rewards ".

From here, you can share your unique link with your friends and family.

For example, if you decide to share a link on Facebook, it will look this:

Whenever a user lands on this blog post, we will track them via their browser cookies for 60 days. If they sign up for BookingKoala within this time frame, the system will automatically register them as a referral under your account. The moment they start paying, you will be rewarded the credits.

Rules:

Ģ You can share links anywhere you'd like.
Ģ The user gets "cookied" for 60 days starting when they click your referral link.
Ģ If someone signs up within 60 days, they will count towards your referral.

? Even if someone signs up within 60 days but doesn't start paying until half a year later, you will still get rewarded.

Do I have to sell the referral?

No, the moment you share your link and someone visits our blog post, we do the rest. Super simple!

Do I get rewarded if someone clicks on the 'Powered By BookingKoala' badge on my site?

If a user clicks on any " Powered By BookingKoala " badge on your site, you will get rewarded if they become a paying client. Whether it is through the badge on your booking form , home page when using our themes, or through a badge sent out via notifications.

The BookingKoala affiliate program
URL: https://help.bookingkoala.com/help/the-bookingkoala-affiliate-program

The BookingKoala affiliate program
Learn how to earn commissions by referring leads to BookingKoala.

Last updated on 14 Aug, 2025

Our current affiliate offers are as follows:

Ģ Offer 1: BookingKoala software
Ģ Offer 2: SalesHangry software (coming soon)

Offer 1: BookingKoala software (40% + 10% for 24 months)
Earn 40% from every paying customer for up to 24 months plus get 10% from all commissions that your promoters earn. Earn a possible $1,000 and a $20,000 bonus by joining today. Learn more about bonuses and earnings below .

We have an excellent product, and we want everyone to make money with it, so donÆt wait too long!

To start, click here to sign up for the affiliate program. If you plan on using BookingKoala or are already using the platform , the affiliate program is already attached to your BookingKoala account. It can be found by visiting " Earn Rewards ". Under the Earn Rewards page you can track all your referrals and earnings as well as find all your referral links.

Please be sure to have a PayPal account connected to your dashboard. This is how we will send your affiliate payment each month. You can also email us at partners@bookingkoala.com for additional support with setting up your PayPal account.

To learn what is inside your affiliate account and how to use it, watch this video .

How do I share my referral links and earn money? (2 simple ways)

There are two ways you can earn money:

1. One of the ways is to share your personal links wherever you'd like. We even created a special page that you can share, awarding your leads a 30-day free trial of BookingKoala, instead of the regular 14 days. This page will entice them to use your link to sign up which will ensure you get commissions while they get 2 weeks extra as a reward.

A few example of leveraging your Referral links

Ģ You know someone who is looking to start a business, and you want to give them your referral link so they get a longer free trial while you make money from your referral.
Ģ You have a lot of friends and family on social media or your blog and you want to share your referral links.
Ģ You're a consultant helping companies start and grow service businesses, and you want to refer them to BookingKoala to earn a commission.

2. The second, extremely easy and effective way to earn passive income is to leave your Powered by BookingKoala badges on your website, booking form, and emails. If you're already growing a business, you'll benefit because competitors and others spy on your business all the time. By leaving these badges they can find the software you use. Most of the time, they find the software anyway; by allowing them to click your Powered By Badge, you'll at least make money from it.

Example of leveraging a Powered By Badge

Ģ Step 1: You already have a business and a website with BookingKoala Powered by badges on it.
Ģ Step 2: Someone lands on your website and decides to look around. Later, they decide to find out what software or booking system you are using because they are either already in business or are looking to start a business.
Ģ Step 3: They click on your Powered By BookingKoala badges (from an email campaign you send, or by looking over your website or booking form).
Ģ Step 4: If they sign up for a trial and start paying for BookingKoala, you will earn 40% for 24 months. If that is a Premium customer, you will get $1,891.20 passively.
Ģ Step 5: Later, if that customer starts referring customers to us, you will get 10% off all commissions that they receive. If we pay them $10,000 in commissions, you will get $1,000. Why? Because your Powered By Badge brought them to BookingKoala, so we want to reward you.
Ģ We know you're in the business of making money since you are already operating a business. Why not make some extra money passively, all by leaving your Powered By Badges on.

Do I have to sell the referral?

No! Super simple: the most important thing is for someone to use your referral links and powered by BookingKoala badges. Once they click those links, we will use our marketing strategies and branding to furture the lead into a paying customer.

Rules:

Ģ You get 40% for every paying customer who uses your referral link for up to 24 months. For example, if you refer a Premium client and they use BookingKoala for 24 months, you will get $1,891.20 .
Ģ If your referral becomes an affiliate you will get 10% of all their commissions. For example, if we pay them $1,000 in commissions that month, you will get $100 .
Ģ If 20 of your referrals become affiliates, and over 5 years, we pay them $1,000,000 in commissions, you will get $100,000 .
Ģ Bonus 1: Receive $1,000 in commissions in your first 3 months and get a $1,000 bonus (just let us know and we will add it to your payout).
Ģ Bonus 2: Reach your first $50,000 in commissions in the first 24 months and get a $10,000 bonus (total $60,000) OR reach $50,000 in commissions in your first 12 months and get a $20,000 bonus (total $70,000) Just let us know and we will add it to your payout!
Ģ Users are cookied for 120 days .
Ģ If your referral signs up and starts a trial within 12 months , you will still get commissions for that referral.
Ģ If your referral cancels and returns within 12 months , you will still get commissions for that referral.
Ģ Commissions are subject to change at any time without notice.
Ģ Bonuses are subject to change at any time without notice.
Ģ Commissions are paid out 60 days after the last day of the commission month. For example, if commissions are earned January 1st-31st , you will get payment the first week of April . This is to account for all refunds and disputes.
Ģ There may be commission adjustments if refunds or disputes are made after paying the affiliate commissions. The adjustments will be reflected in a future payment to the affiliate.
Ģ A paying customer cannot cancel their account and re-sign up using your referral codes, nor can they earn you commissions if they are already an existing BookingKoala client.
Ģ In the case where a customer is already a BookingKoala paying client, you can only get commissions if the customer upgrades to Premium, and if they downgrade later, your commissions will be lost (this applies to users who are still using the 14-day free trial).
Ģ If a lead completes a free trial and does not start paying right away, they have 365 days to be a paying customer for you to receive commissions.
Ģ You or the business that is associated with you cannot sign up for BookingKoala using your own affiliate link or a link that is associated with you.
Ģ We reserve the right to cancel any payment or terminate your account.

Offer 2: SalesHangry software (coming soon)
As soon as we release this program, we will let you know here!

If you have any questions regarding the affiliate program, please email us at partners@bookingkoala.com or join our Facebook Affiliate group .



Request feature page
URL: https://help.bookingkoala.com/help/request-features

Request feature page
Learn how to request new BookingKoala features that may be helpful to your business.

Last updated on 10 Sept, 2024

Feedback is very important to us here at BookingKoala. We regularly monitor our Feature Request page and use these points when working on new software updates.

If you'd like to share your ideas for new features or improvements to the software, click here (https://feedback.bookingkoala.com/contribute/feature-requests/). Click the blue "Submit Feedback" button and a pop-up will appear where you can enter in a title and description for your feedback/request.

You can also search the existing feature requests and feedback by clicking on the magnifying glass icon. If you like an idea, click the up arrow icon to upvote it.

You can sort the feature requests by what is trending, what has the most votes, and what is the newest.

We also have a Roadmap feature that shows which requests have been completed, which are in the planning stages, and our top feedback and requests. Click here (https://feedback.bookingkoala.com/) to view the BookingKoala Roadmap.

In addition to this, we have a Changelog that chronicles all of our software updates, bug fixes, and feature releases. Click here (https://feedback.bookingkoala.com/changelog/) to view the BookingKoala Changelog.



Customer Service & Support Resources
URL: https://help.bookingkoala.com/help/24-7-365-support

Customer Service & Support Resources
Learn how to reach BookingKoala and the fastest way to get help.

Last updated on 25 Apr, 2025

Live Support
At BookingKoala, we offer 24/7, 365-day support via email. We receive hundreds of emails every day so we appreciate your patience with us. We strive to provide the best customer support possible and can typically answer questions you have within a few hours or sooner. Keep in mind occasionally or when questions are more technical it may take longer.

We can be reached via email at support@bookingkoala.com .

You can call us at +1 (800) 671-9655 for phone support. If someone does not pick up, please leave us a detailed voicemail and someone will call you back as soon as they are available.

To schedule a Demo please click here (https://calendly.com/bookingkoala) and pick a date and time.

For product updates, important statuses, and more click here (https://new.bookingkoala.com/updates/) and Subscribe to get updates.

At this time we do not offer any live chat support but you can use the live chat widget to browse through help center articles or send us an email.

Other Ways to Receive Help
For the fastest support, please search our help center (https://help.bookingkoala.com/help) for articles on general information, how to set up your store, and troubleshooting common problems.

Another great way to get help is to ask other entrepreneurs and developers using BookingKoala inside of our Facebook group (https://www.facebook.com/groups/bookingkoala) .

This is also a great resource when it comes to asking questions about how to run your business, getting advice on specific situations, and finding freelancers who can help with your setup and design.

Close/cancel your account
URL: https://help.bookingkoala.com/help/pausing-or-closing-your-account

Close/cancel your account
Learn how to cancel your BookingKoala account.

Last updated on 30 Sept, 2024

The purpose of this article is to help you:
Ģ Close your account
Ģ Determine if your cancellation request was sent successfully

How to Close Your Account
If you'd like to cancel your account, go to: Settings > Account > Subscription Plans

Under "Current Plan" click the red "Cancel Subscription" button. A pop-up window will ask if you are sure you want to cancel.

If you are sure you are ready to close your account, click the grey "Yes" button to proceed.

Please note: When you cancel your account, your entire account will be deleted and we will not be able to retrieve any previously stored data like customers, providers, leads, and your store/booking form settings.

Click here to learn how to export your customer data.
Click here to learn how to export your provider data.
Click here to learn how to export your lead data.

Has my cancellation request been received?
To check if your cancelation request has been received, you can go back to: Settings > Account > Subscription Plans

If you do not see the option anymore, that means you have already clicked on the "Cancel Subscription" button and your request has been received successfully. If you have further questions, you are always welcome

Can I pause my account?
Unfortunately, there is no option to pause subscription plans at this time. We recommend downgrading to the Starter subscription if you would like to retain your data.



Logging in
URL: https://help.bookingkoala.com/help/logging-in

Logging in
Last updated on 30 Sept, 2024

The purpose of this article is to help you understand:

How to Login
Login Via The BookingKoala Homepage

Admin (the creator/owner of the account) can log in through the login page on BookingKoala's homepage.

Click the orange "Login" button in the top right corner of the page and then enter the email address and password on this page to be automatically signed into your store.

Login via Your BookingKoala Domain

All users (staff, admin, customers, and providers) can log in using the login page associated with your BookingKoala subdomain.

For example, if you entered "demo2" as the store name when first signing up, the login page for your Bookingkoala subdomain would be: https://demo2.bookingkoala.com/login

Users can also go to your business's main domain and click the "Login/Signup" link at the top of the header to navigate to the Login page.

Once they enter their login details under the "Sign In Through Your Email" section, they will click the "Sign In" button and this will open their dashboard.

If you have enabled sign-in/sign-up with Facebook or Google, customers can also log in by clicking either of these options on the login page. Please note that these options will not work for admin, staff, or provider accounts.

After clicking the button, a pop-up window will allow users to enter their Facebook or Google email and password. Hit the enter key or click "Log In" to finish logging in.

Please note: Customers who log in using either of these options will need to use the same method to view their customer dashboard. Admin, staff, and provider accounts CANNOT use Facebook or Google.

Click here to set up a Facebook login: https://help.bookingkoala.com/help/activate-facebook-and-google-sign-up-login Click here to set up a Google login: https://help.bookingkoala.com/help/activate-google-sign-up-log-in

Login Via the Login Form on Your Custom Domain

If you have connected a custom domain to one of our themes and have embedded the "Login Form" into your website, all users can go to your custom domain and locate the page with the embedded "login" form.

Click here to learn how to embed forms into an existing website: https://help.bookingkoala.com/help/embed-the-forms-on-your-existing-website Click here to learn how to connect a custom domain or subdomain: https://help.bookingkoala.com/help/how-to-set-up-custom-domains



Resetting passwords
URL: https://help.bookingkoala.com/help/reset-password

Resetting passwords
Last updated on 07 Oct, 2024

The purpose of this article is to help you understand:

Ģ How admin, staff, customers, and providers can reset their password
Ģ How admin can reset passwords from the backend

Admin Password
When you first signed up for your BookingKoala account, you received an email to confirm your email address. If you did not confirm your email through this link, you will not receive any emails to reset your password.

If you have confirmed your email and are still not receiving anything please email us at support@bookingkoala.com and we will make sure that everything was saved properly.

Reset Password
BookingKoala Homepage

One place the Admin and Staff can reset their password is through the login page on BookingKoala's homepage.

Click the " Login " button in the top right corner of the page.

Then, click the " Forgot Password? " link below the login boxes.

You will be redirected to a " Reset Password " page. Enter your email into the box and click the " Reset Password Now " button.

Your BookingKoala Subdomain

All of your users can reset their password with the login page on the URL that was created for you when you signed up for your account.

For example, if you entered "Demo2" as your store name when you first created your account, your URL would be:

https://demo2.bookingkoala.com

Once you are on the site, click the "Login/Signup " link at the top of the header to navigate to the Login page .  Click the " Forgot Password? " link below the login boxes.

You will be redirected to a " Reset Password " page. Enter your email into the box and click the " Reset Password Now " button.

Login Page on Your Custom Domain

If you have connected a custom domain to one of our themes and have embedded forms onto your website, then all of your users can also go to that domain address and locate the page with the embedded login form.

From here, they can click the " Forgot Password? " link below the login boxes to enter their email address and retrieve their password.

Reset Passwords from the Backend
In addition to these options, the admin can reset the password for other users' accounts if they are logged into their dashboard.

Reset a Customer or Provider's Password

The process of resetting a provider's password is the same as a customer, so for this example, we will go over how to reset a customer's password.

To reset a provider's password, the only difference is you will start by going to:

Providers > Providers > [Provider Name]

To reset a customer's password, first go to:

Customers > Customers > [Customer Name]

On the customer or provider's dashboard , click the " Profile " tab.

Then, scroll down towards the bottom of the page until you see the grey " Change Password " button.

A pop-up window will appear where you can enter the new password into the boxes.

Then, decide if you'd like to exclude a notification from being sent to the customer regarding the updated password.  If you do, check the box next to " Exclude notification from being sent ".

Then, click the blue " Save " button in the pop-up window to update the password.

Finally, click the blue " Update " button in the customer's profile to save the new password to their account.

Reset a Staff Account's Password

To reset a staff member's password, go to:

Settings > Staff > Staff Members

Click " Options ", then " Edit " next to the staff member who needs their password reset.

You will be redirected to the staff member's profile .  Click on the grey " Change Password " button at the bottom of the screen.

A pop-up window will appear where you can enter the new password into the boxes.

Then, decide if you'd like to exclude a notification from being sent to the staff member regarding the updated password.  If you do, check the box next to " Exclude notification from being sent ".

Click the blue " Save " button in the pop-up window to update the password.

Finally, click the blue " Save " button in the staff member's profile to save the new password to their account.



Upgrade or downgrade your subscription
URL: https://help.bookingkoala.com/help/upgrade-or-downgrade-your-subscription

Upgrade or downgrade your subscription
Learn where to go if you'd like to upgrade or downgrade your BookingKoala subscription.

Last updated on 02 Sept, 2025

In this article, you will learn:
Ģ How to upgrade or downgrade your account
Ģ How prorated subscription charges work
Ģ Common downgrade errors

Upgrade or Downgrade Your BookingKoala Subscription
Perhaps your company is growing, and you want to upgrade your BookingKoala subscription to add more providers and take advantage of the Premium features. Or, maybe you are still in the setup phase and would like to downgrade your account until you are ready to launch. Either way, you can upgrade or downgrade your BookingKoala subscription directly from your admin account anytime.

To change your subscription plan, please go to: Settings > Account > Subscription Plans

Scroll down the page until you see the three main subscriptions. Your current plan will have a green label that says "Current". The other plans will have a blue button that says "Select".

Click the "Select" button beneath the plan you would like to upgrade or downgrade to and a side panel will open. Here you can decide whether to use the card on file or add a new card for the plan change charge. Then click the "Save" button to complete the change.

The system will charge the additional amount for the remaining time in the current billing cycle immediately, and then the monthly prices will be charged on the billing cycle.

If you are already a Premium subscriber and would like to look at larger Premium plans, click on the green "See Larger Plans" button at the top section or scroll further down until you reach the "See Larger Plans" button.

Use the slider to see the price per month and details of what is included in each subscription. Premium plan pricing differs based on the total number of providers or data in gigabytes as well as the total number of contacts included in the Campaign Module.

For example:
Ģ If you anticipate working with up to 100 providers, please select the Premium $397 plan which accounts for 100 total providers.
Ģ If your account currently uses 85 GB of data, select the Premium $357 plan that accounts for up to 90 GB.
Ģ If you have just over 5000 contacts stored in your Campaign Module, select the Premium $237 plan so you have room to grow up to 10,000 contacts.

Once you've toggled to the plan you would like to choose, click the blue "Select" button, select a card for the prorated subscription charge, and then click "Save".

A green system notification will appear at the top right corner of the page, confirming your subscription has been upgraded.

Prorated Subscription Charges
Please note that when you make a subscription change, the payment will always be prorated based on the adjustment, ensuring a fair and accurate charge. This prorated amount will be reflected in your next billing statement.

Ģ If you upgrade, the system will charge the additional amount for the remaining time in the current billing cycle immediately, and then the monthly prices will be charged on the billing cycle.
? For example, if your billing date is on the 13th of every month and you decide to upgrade on the 1st of the month from the Growing $57 plan to the Premium $197 plan, you would only be charged $54.01 for time already spent on the Growing plan.
Ģ If you plan to downgrade your account, the system automatically credits the difference to your account and applies it to your next upcoming balance.
? For example, if your billing date is on the 24th and you downgrade on the 31st from the Premium $197 plan to the Growing $57 plan, your account will be credited $108.99 which will be applied to your regular monthly payments.

If you have any questions about your prorated subscription charges or credits, please do not hesitate to reach out to our support team at support@bookingkoala.com .

Common Errors When Downgrading
It is important to consider how you are currently using your BookingKoala account when deciding to downgrade your subscription, as it may impact your ability to do so. This is because each subscription contains features that may not be included in a lower-tier plan. If you are currently utilizing a feature that is only available on the Growing or Premium subscriptions and want to downgrade to the Starter plan, you may need to disable or delete certain types of data from your account before you can proceed.

A few of the most common restrictions when downgrading to a smaller plan are as follows.

Total Number of Providers The total number of providers you can have in your account (both active and deactivated) varies based on subscription.
Ģ The Starter $27 subscription allows for up to 5 total providers.
Ģ The Growing $57 subscription allows for up to 15 providers.
Ģ The Premium $197 subscription allows for up to 50 providers.
Ģ Larger Premium subscriptions allow for 50+ providers.

For example, if you have 20 total providers (including deactivated provider accounts) and you want to downgrade to the Growing subscription, you will need to delete at least 5 provider accounts before you can continue.

Click here to learn how to deactivate and then delete any provider accounts you do not want to use. Please note that all data associated with the provider account will be permanently deleted along with the profile and cannot be retrieved.

More Than One Industry If you are looking to downgrade from a Growing or Premium subscription to a Starter subscription, you must ensure that you have only one industry.
Ģ The Starter $27 subscription allows for one industry.
Ģ The Growing $57 and Premium subscriptions allow for unlimited industries.

If you have multiple industries set up, you will need to delete whichever industries you do not want to use.

Click here to learn how to delete an industry. Please note that all data associated with that industry will be permanently deleted and cannot be retrieved.

More Than One Location If you are looking to downgrade from a Growing or Premium subscription to a Starter subscription, you must ensure that you have only one location.
Ģ The Starter $27 subscription allows for one location/service area only.
Ģ The Growing $57 and Premium subscriptions allow for unlimited locations and service areas.

If you have multiple industries set up, you will need to delete whichever locations you do not want to use.

Click here to learn how to delete (or consolidate) locations.

Contacts in the Campaign Module Each Premium subscription contains a different threshold for the amount of contacts you can have stored in the Campaign Module.
Ģ The Starter $27 and Growing $57 subscriptions do not include the Campaign Module.
Ģ The Premium $197 plan allows for up to 5000 contacts.
Ģ The Premium $237 plan allows for up to 10,000 contacts.
Ģ The Premium $277 plan allows for up to 15,000 contacts.
Ģ The Premium $317 plan allows for up to 20,000 contacts.
Ģ Etc.

If you are looking to downgrade to a smaller Premium subscription, you will need to ensure that you do not exceed the guidelines for the total number of contacts in your desired plan.

Click here to learn how to delete contacts from your audience(s). Currently, there is no bulk delete button for contacts, however our development team is currently working on an option. In the meantime, please email us at support@bookingkoala.com if you would like to do a bulk delete of your contacts and we will see if we can help.

Premium Checklist Features If you are using multiple dependencies for your checklists or are using the same checklist across multiple service categories, forms, and industries, these are Premium features. Until you remove these components, you will not be able to downgrade to the Starter or Growing plans.
Ģ The Starter $27 and Growing $57 s subscriptions allow you to create a unique checklist for each service category.
Ģ The Premium subscriptions also allow you to create unique checklists for each service category, however, you also can:
? Set up dependencies based on parameters such as location, frequency, or extras
? Make "EXACT/ANY Combinations"
? Use the "Exclude checklist option"
? Use the same checklist for multiple industries and forms

Click here to learn more about checklist dependencies, including where to update them if you'd like to downgrade.
