Get more clients using our marketplace
URL: https://help.bookingkoala.com/help/get-more-clients-using-our-marketplace

Get more clients using our marketplace
Struggling to get clients? Learn how we can help without breaking the bank.

Last updated on 24 Mar, 2022

PLEASE NOTE: Currently the Marketplace app development is on pause so that we can work on improving the software with more features and functionality that our customers have been asking for. Once we have determined that we are ready to move back into finalizing the app, we will let you all know.

The BookingKoala Marketplace
Our Marketplace is being built to help you get more jobs without breaking the bank.

You shouldn't have to worry about gaining clients, especially if you are starting or have no marketing experience. So, let us do that for you!

We take a small 10% commission for any job you complete. This will make acquiring jobs more affordable, and you only pay once the job has been completed.

This creates the perfect opportunity to open a business and get clients right away. Once ready, we will be actively searching for business from all sorts of industries and locations to fulfill the needs of our Marketplace shoppers.

Requirements:
To join our marketplace, we will have several requirements.

1535 You must be a Growing BookingKoala user (more on that later).
1536 You must complete 5 bookings on our platform before being listed as a business under our marketplace.
1537 You must receive 2 reviews inside the platform before being listed.
1538 You must offer all of our leads a 10% to 25% discount on your services (it is up to you how much you'd like to offer). This is a first-time (one-time) client discount and it will only be applied towards the first service. The system will handle this automatically and you will be able to track everything from your dashboard.

How will I get clients?
We will drive the traffic to you. When a user signs up for our mailing list, we will send them an email with our top businesses in their location and desired industry.

For example, if a holiday is coming up, we will reach out to you to offer special deals to potential buyers when we promote your business. Sometimes, we may even send out emails that focus on your company exclusively.

Whenever the lead is ready to book, they will do so through your booking form, giving them access to all of the BookingKOala features. They'll be able to tip your providers, rate the service, book new services, and reschedule on the go, plus all of the other features we are always adding.

How can I get placed higher on the list?
Each new business that signs up for the marketplace will be automatically placed at the bottom of the list. Based on several different factors, we may move you up the list as time goes by.

These factors include:

Ģ Your average ratings
Ģ The types of promotions and pricing you offer
Ģ Having a quality, user-friendly experience on your website

We will be seeking new businesses to join our list, so securing your spot early will greatly benefit your business before the lists become too crowded. We will announce once we are accepting new businesses for the Marketplace.

Why must I be a "Growing" subscriber to participate?
All of our shoppers will be promised a great service. The goal of our platform is to help get customers what they want. Too many businesses rely on outdated business models without keeping up with trends that focus on the customer's experience.

Today, services like Uber are ruling the industry by offering businesses convenience and an excellent experience. Meanwhile, smaller businesses may struggle to meet the same requirements for many different reasons.

We hope that BookingKoala can allow these smaller businesses to complete with multi-million dollar services and even the playing field. Through our features, businesses can offer discounts to customers while customers will rate their experience, helping us determine which businesses are doing well.

Why must I have 5 completed bookings and 2 reviews to participate?
We require a minimum of 5 completed bookings and 2 reviews to particular in the Marketplace program. This is to validate that you are a real user. This also helps us determine what type of service you offer.

We closely monitor reviews to ensure the best businesses are showcased to our potential leads. If you'd completed jobs in the past somewhere else, you can easily replicate them on our platform. Even if you've completed hundreds of jobs, we would be happy to assist in getting them scheduled into your platform, so you can become listed within just a few hours.

Why do I have to offer a 10-25% discount for the first service?
There are three main reasons why we would offer this coupon code.

1539 Having a discount code will allow you to track how many clients we get your business.
1540 So we can track your commissions. However, if a customer books with you without ever entering the coupon code, you will take home 100% of the revenue and we will get no commission.
1541 Leads enjoy discounts and it increases conversion into recurring customers.

How do I track how many clients the marketplace gets me?
Since most of the users will use the coupon code, you can run a report from the Reports section of your dashboard. Enter the code into the "Coupon" filter towards the top of the page.

If a customer calls your office to book and you apply the coupon on the customer's behalf, it will still be tracked here.

What if you don't advertise my industry or location yet?
If you are the first to be interested in an area we don't service yet, this will be a great opportunity to sign up and get ahead of the pack! Once we have three interested businesses in your industry and location, you will be added to that region and we will begin to advertise for you. If shoppers like what you have to offer, they can book right then and there.

As of right now, signs ups are currently closed until we launch the marketplace program.

How do I get started?
To get started, you must first sign up for a BookingKoala account, on the Growing plan or higher.

Once the marketplace platform is launched, you'll be able to request to join the marketplace right from within your account.

After your request is received, we will reach out and contact you with more information on how to get started.



Phone settings for GPS tracking
URL: https://help.bookingkoala.com/help/phone-settings-for-gps-tracking

Phone settings for GPS tracking
Learn which phone settings allow the GPS clock in/out function to track more accurately.

Features Described:
Ģ GPS clock-in/clock-out feature: Available for Growing or Premium plan subscribers. Used to log booking times accurately via the BookingKoala for Providers app.

Important Notes / Limitations:
Ģ Several phone settings may impact the accuracy of booking time logs.
Ģ The recommendations below help improve location and tracking accuracy for the BookingKoala for Providers app.

Optimizing GPS Tracking - iPhone Settings
1. Location Settings (iPhone)
To ensure that the GPS is always being accessed by the BookingKoala for Providers app, the phone's location services should be set to "Always". Navigation Path: Settings > Privacy > Location Services Steps:
1542 Open your phone and go to Settings > Privacy > Location Services.
1543 Make sure the toggle next to "Location Services" is set to "On"/green.
1544 Scroll down the list of apps in this section and click on "BookingKoala for Providers".
1545 Beneath "Allow Location Access", make sure the option "Always" has a green checkmark next to it. If it does not, click "Always" to update the app's settings.

2. Background App Refresh (iPhone)
In order for iPhones to consistently track your location, it is recommended to have "background app refresh" turned on and enabled for the BookingKoala for Providers app. Navigation Path: Settings > General Steps:
1546 Begin by opening your phone and going to Settings > General.
1547 Tap "Background App Refresh" and make sure it is set to "On" at the top of the section.
1548 Scroll down until you locate the "BookingKoala for Providers" app and check that the toggle button is "On"/green.
1549 If the toggle is grey, tap it once to switch it to "On"/green.

3. Data Saver Mode (iPhone)
If your phone has "Low Data Mode" enabled, you may face issues with apps that require background data usage to keep GPS tracking active. Disabling "Low Data Mode" can help improve tracking accuracy. Navigation Path: Settings > Cellular Data > Cellular Data Options Steps:
1550 Open your phone and go to Settings > Cellular Data > Cellular Data Options.
1551 Locate the "Low Data Mode" section and make sure it is toggled to "Off"/grey.
1552 If the toggle button is "On"/green, tap it once to turn it to the off position.

Optimizing GPS Tracking - Android Settings
1. Location Settings (Android)
Location services must be set to "Always" for the BookingKoala for Providers app. Navigation Path: Settings > Location Steps:
1553 Open your phone and go to Settings > Location.
1554 Make sure that "Location" is toggled to "On" at the top of the screen.
1555 Click on "App Permissions".
1556 Click on the "BookingKoala for Providers" app in the list below.
1557 Beneath "Location access for this app", make sure "Allow all the time" has been selected. If not, click "Allow all the time" to update the app's settings.

2. Improve Location Accuracy (Android)
Additional location options can affect the accuracy of your phone's GPS. Navigation Path: Settings > Location Steps:
1558 Start by going to Settings > Location.
1559 Click on "Improve Accuracy".
1560 Make sure both "Wi-Fi scanning" and "Bluetooth scanning" are both set to "On"/blue.
1561 If not, click the grey toggle button to turn it to "On"/blue for each option.

3. Allow Background Data (Android)
Background data usage must be enabled for continuous tracking and logging. Navigation Path 1: Settings > Network and Internet > Data Usage > App Data Usage Steps 1:
1562 Start by going to Settings > Network and Internet > Data Usage > App Data Usage.
1563 Scroll down to view a list of your apps and tap on the "BookingKoala for Providers" app.
1564 Check the bottom of this section and make sure "Background data" is toggled to "On"/blue.
1565 If not, click the grey toggle button to turn it to "On"/blue.

Navigation Path 2 (Some Androids): Settings > Network and Internet > Mobile Network > Data Usage > App Data Usage Steps 2:
1566 Open your phone and go to Settings > Network and Internet > Mobile Network > Data Usage > App Data Usage.
1567 Scroll down to view a list of your apps and tap on the "BookingKoala for Providers" app.
1568 Check the bottom of this section and make sure "Background data" is toggled to "On"/blue.
1569 If not, click the grey toggle button to turn it to "On"/blue.

Navigation Path 3 (Older Androids): Settings > Connections > Data Usage Steps 3:
1570 Open your phone and go to Settings > Connections > Data Usage.
1571 Tap on "Mobile data usage".
1572 Scroll down until you locate the "BookingKoala for Provider's App" and tap on it.
1573 Make sure the toggle button is set to "On"/blue for "Allow background data usage" and "Allow app while data saver is on".
1574 If one or both of the buttons are grey, tap the button once to switch it to "On"/blue.

4. Battery Usage (Android)
Some Android devices allow you to control background data for each individual app. Navigation Path: Settings > Apps > BookingKoala for Providers Steps:
1575 Open your phone and go to Settings > Apps > BookingKoala for Providers.
1576 Tap on "Battery".
1577 Below "Manage Battery Use" make sure "Allow background activity" is toggled to "On"/blue.
1578 If the toggle button is grey, tap it once to switch it to "On"/blue.
1579 Next, tap on "Optimize battery usage".
1580 Locate the "BookingKoala for Providers" app and make sure that the toggle button is set to "Off"/white.
1581 If the toggle is "On"/blue, tap it once to turn "Off" battery optimization.

5. Sleeping App Settings (Android)
To ensure that the BookingKoala for Providers app is consistently using your phone GPS, the app should be listed under the "Never Sleeping Apps" section. Navigation Path 1: Settings > Battery & Device Care > Battery > Background Usage Limits Steps 1:
1582 To begin, open your phone and go to Settings > Battery & Device Care > Battery > Background Usage Limits.
1583 Click on the "Never Sleeping Apps" section. If BookingKoala for Providers has already been added to this list, you are all set!
1584 If not, click the + sign at the top of the screen, select the BookingKoala for Providers app, and then click "Add".

Navigation Path 2 (Some Android devices): Settings > Device Care > Battery > App Power Management Steps 2:
1585 Begin by going to Settings > Device Care > Battery > App Power Management.
1586 Click on the "Apps that won't be put to sleep" section. If BookingKoala for Providers has already been added to this list, you are all set!
1587 If not, click the + sign at the top of the screen, select the BookingKoala for Providers app, and then click "Add".
